title: MEDICAL SERVICES - 211info
text: WHITE SALMON CREEK MEDICAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult medical care including yearly exams for all adults, and immunizations such as COVID-19, and flu vaccines. Other services provided include behavioral health evaluations, routine health exams, colorectal and prostate cancer detection, newborn/infant screenings, pediatric care, and extensive sports physicals. Additionally, provides care customized to the unique needs of older adults, including Medicare annual wellness visits. 65371 Highway 14 White Salmon, WA 98672 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 11am-6pm On-call provider and nurse: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (509) 493-2133 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (509) 493-2133 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 11am-6pm Services: Childhood Immunization Colorectal Cancer Detection Community Clinics COVID-19 Diagnostic Tests COVID-19 Treatment General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Newborn Screening Pediatrics Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WHITE SALMON CREEK
